object_a.label: cabinet
object_a.description: dark wood sideboard/cabinet along left wall of dining room
object_a.long_form_open_description: Long dark-wood sideboard or buffet positioned against the left wall inside the dining room; decorative items or small objects sit on top (not legible), finish appears polished and matches dining furniture style.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: to the left of the dining table when looking into the dining room

object_b.label: cabinet
object_b.description: dark wooden buffet/sideboard against left wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: A carved dark-wood buffet or sideboard positioned along the left wall, about mid-depth in the room. The cabinet has a decorative front and a flat top surface holding small objects and a plant. It appears traditional in style and matches the darker wood tones of the table and chairs.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits to the left of the dining table and below a small framed picture on the left wall.
